name: Level 3 Communications, Inc.
description: Level 3 Communications, Inc. was a prominent American multinational telecommunications and internet service provider that operated a massive global fiber-optic network. The company provided core network services, including internet protocol, voice, data, and content delivery, to enterprise, government, and carrier customers. In 2017, Level 3 Communications was acquired by CenturyLink, which subsequently rebranded as Lumen Technologies in 2020. Today, the legacy of Level 3's extensive infrastructure serves as a foundational component of the Lumen Technologies network, supporting advanced digital solutions, cloud connectivity, and secure enterprise communications on a global scale.
